Блок1-03 Двухэтажный хай-тек.scriptText:
250 квадратов хай-тека. И всё это — на земле с аукциона.

Сначала ровный участок с видом на реку.

Монолитный каркас поднимается в два этажа.

Плоская кровля, терраса на втором этаже.

Панорамное остекление от пола до потолка.

Вечер. Тёплый свет в окнах. Это твой дом. Торги Земли.
Блок1-03 Двухэтажный хай-тек.whiskPrompts:
High aerial drone view of an empty flat green plot overlooking a calm river at golden hour, surveyor marker peg, NO skyscrapers, NO high-rise buildings, NO tower cranes, NO city skyline — across the river only forest and a few small modern low-rise cottages similar in style to the main house, modern premium Russian residential setting, no building yet, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
LOW ground-level drone shot skimming over the grass toward the foundation layout: string lines, wooden stakes and freshly poured concrete slab edge on the plot, river sparkling behind, same golden hour, NO skyscrapers, NO high-rise buildings, NO tower cranes, NO city skyline — across the river only forest and a few small modern low-rise cottages similar in style to the main house, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
Construction stage: monolithic concrete frame of a modern hi-tech house — EXACTLY TWO STORIES, ground floor and second floor with a finished flat top slab, NO third floor, NO rebar columns sticking up above the top slab, NO formwork above the second floor, same low drone three-quarter angle, river behind, golden hour, NO skyscrapers, NO high-rise buildings, NO tower cranes, NO city skyline — across the river only forest and a few small modern low-rise cottages similar in style to the main house, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
The SAME two-story hi-tech house near complete: white render and warm wood accents, flat roof with a CLEAN EMPTY roof edge — NO glass railings on the roof, NO rooftop glass structures, NO third-level additions, second-floor terrace, full-height glazing being installed, same low drone angle, river view, golden hour, NO skyscrapers, NO high-rise buildings, NO tower cranes, NO city skyline — across the river only forest and a few small modern low-rise cottages similar in style to the main house, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
THE EXACT SAME completed two-story hi-tech house with full-height panoramic glazing and second-floor terrace, now with a stylish modern low fence around the plot perimeter (dark slat fence), landscaped garden: green lawn, young trees, ornamental shrubs, stone pathways, river view, same low drone angle, golden hour, NO skyscrapers, NO high-rise buildings, NO tower cranes, NO city skyline — across the river only forest and a few small modern low-rise cottages similar in style to the main house, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
THE EXACT SAME two-story hi-tech house in the evening with the SAME dark slat fence and the SAME landscaped garden (trees, shrubs, pathways unchanged), warm light glowing in panoramic windows, a Slavic European family with light skin on the second-floor terrace, the river is visible ONLY in the BACKGROUND BEHIND the house — the FOREGROUND at the bottom of the frame is green lawn and garden, NO water in the foreground, NO stream, NO rocks at the bottom edge, NO skyscrapers, NO high-rise buildings, NO tower cranes — across the river only forest and a few small modern low-rise cottages, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
Блок1-03 Двухэтажный хай-тек.videoPrompts:
High slow aerial drift over the empty plot and river, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Fast low drone skim over the grass toward the foundation layout, string lines flutter, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Seamless construction time-lapse: time flows STRICTLY FORWARD, the concrete frame rises and STOPS FOREVER at exactly two stories with the flat top slab as the final roof — NO additional columns, NO third level, NOTHING gets built above the top slab at any moment of the shot, fixed locked-off camera, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Seamless time-lapse: white facade and wood cladding cover the frame, glazing installs, roof stays clean and flat, fixed locked-off camera, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Seamless time-lapse: dark slat fence builds around the plot, lawn rolls out, trees and shrubs appear, fixed locked-off camera, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Evening: window lights glow, family on the terrace, camera slowly pulls back over the LAWN in the foreground (no water below), river stays behind the house, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
